name: Shelk Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Fashion seasons and road traffic sit on top of the Principalities nine-day week
Market and tailoring pulses intensify around Freedai and before major public showcases
feast_days: cathedral ritual cycles linked to Cysur and Cyfoes
legal_deadlines: Fashion-code, decorum, and civic processing tighten around noble events and showcase windows
shipping_windows: Roadwarden-protected routes peak before markets and major public gatherings
weather_expectations: Spring bloom and mild-season tourism increase artistic output and route density
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Felujitas and household remembrance practices favor tasteful renewal rather than raw spectacle
public_language_about_time: People often reference seasons, show cycles, and week-turnover as social time markers
